settings.question: How long does the battery last on a single charge?
settings.answer: Runtime depends on your load. A 2 kWh configuration runs a 200W fridge for ~8 hours, or charges a laptop 20+ times.

settings.question: Can I add more capacity later?
settings.answer: Yes. Add battery modules at any time. Each adds 1 kWh. No tools needed.

settings.question: Is it safe to use indoors?
settings.answer: Completely safe. LiFePO4 produces no fumes and has no thermal runaway risk.

settings.question: What is the return policy?
settings.answer: 30-day returns. Contact support and we'll arrange a free return and full refund.

settings.question: How do I claim my warranty?
settings.answer: Contact our support team with your order number and a description of the issue. We'll handle it quickly.

settings.title: 30-Day Returns
settings.description: Return within 30 days for a full refund.

settings.title: 2-Year Warranty
settings.description: Full manufacturer warranty on every unit.
